results.name: helper purity confirmation

results.name: evidence carrier location confirmation
results.summary: ownership_evidence: per-task verification records at docs/supercode/<work_id>/verification/<task_id>.json. security_trigger_evidence: same per-task verification records. Strict-completion matrix: markdown table in plan.md (read-only after approval) and final-review artifact/section. All locations documented in skill docs and validated by contract tests.

executor_evidence: T06 performed full regression verification (bun test: 1036 pass, 36 skip, 0 fail), typecheck (tsc --noEmit clean), and current-work validation. Review finding fixed: src/__tests__/workflow-coordination-artifacts-current-work.test.ts now includes T06 in REQUIRED_VERIFICATION_TASKS and the validation test label now states T00-T06. WORK_ID validation passes with 28 pass, 526 expect() calls and validates verification records T00-T06 with base Phase 2 and Phase 3 ownership/security evidence. No-WORK_ID skip passes (0 pass, 28 skip, 0 fail). Scope boundary review confirmed no new public stage, no new skill dir, no per-worker worktree, no OS/distributed lock, no full OMO Team Mode, no raw ulw, no free agent chat, no runtime broker, no git/fs runtime automation in helper, and no glob ownership. Helper purity confirmed: workflow-coordination-artifacts.ts imports only zod, uses pure string validation, no filesystem/shell/network/todowrite dependencies. Evidence carrier locations confirmed: ownership_evidence and security_trigger_evidence in per-task verification/<task_id>.json records; strict-completion matrix in plan.md markdown table (read-only) and final-review artifact. Exact repo-relative path semantics confirmed: target_type path only, no glob, no directory-prefix expansion, no absolute/.. paths. Canonical enum/status/field name consistency confirmed across helper schemas, helper tests, and markdown contract tests via imported schema assertions. Phase 3-2 roadmap items remain documented as deferred across all skill docs.

notes: T06 is the final verification task. It creates verification/T06.json, appends to mailbox.jsonl and ledger.jsonl, and applies narrow test corrections requested by T06 review.

All verification commands pass: bun test (1036 pass), bun run typecheck (clean), no-WORK_ID skip (28 skip), current-work validation (28 pass, 574 expect() calls).

T06 creates a verification JSON record, appends to JSONL artifacts, and applies one narrow test correction for the review finding. No code execution behavior, filesystem mutation logic, shell command behavior, authentication, secrets handling, git operations, network calls, dependency changes, sandbox behavior, or untrusted-input handling is introduced.
